title: The Gold Bonds (Immunities and Exemptions) Act, 1993
full_text: The Gold Bonds (Immunities and Exemptions) Act, 1993 स्‍वर्ण बाण्‍ड (उन्‍मुक्‍ति और छूट) अधिनियम, 1993 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199325 Act Number: 25 Enactment Date: 1993-04-02 Act Year: 1993 Short Title: The Gold Bonds (Immunities and Exemptions) Act, 1993 Hindi Title: स्‍वर्ण बाण्‍ड (उन्‍मुक्‍ति और छूट) अधिनियम, 1993 Long Title: An Act to provide for certain immunities to the subscribers of the Gold Bonds and for certain exemptions from direct taxes in relation to such Bonds and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto.
